_comment: Persistent named session definitions for the OpenClaw Agent Co-ordinator fleet. Applied by setup.sh via 'openclaw sessions register'.

sessions.label: R. Daneel — Co-ordinator
sessions.description: Central co-ordinator. Classifies tasks, delegates to specialists, aggregates results, reports back to main session.

sessions.label: R. Sammy — Python Developer
sessions.description: Python scripts, automation, API integrations, data pipelines.

sessions.label: R. Giskard — Docker/Infra
sessions.description: Docker Compose, container hardening, Traefik, networking, service deployments.

sessions.label: R. Andrew — Creative Director
sessions.description: Blog posts, announcements, naming, tone, content strategy.
